logger.doc:name: Before HTTP Billing Call
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: vars.correlationId default "", payload: payload default "" }]

logger.doc:name: After HTTP: Log Payload and Correlation ID
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: vars.correlationId default "", payload: payload default "" }]

on-error-propagate.doc:name: 500 for Any Process API Error in Billing

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Error", timestamp: now() as String { format: "yyyy-MM-dd:HH:mm:ss" }, correlationId: vars.correlationId default "", errorCode: "MULE-ERR-500", message: "Internal Server Error", details: error.description default "" }

logger.doc:name: After HTTP: Error Payload and Correlation ID
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: vars.correlationId default "", payload: payload default "" }]

logger.doc:name: Before HTTP Billing Status Call
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: vars.correlationId default "", payload: payload default "" }]

logger.doc:name: Log Payload and correlation ID
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: vars.correlationId default "", payload: payload default "" }]

on-error-propagate.doc:name: 500 for Any Process API Error in Status

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Error", timestamp: now() as String { format: "yyyy-MM-dd:HH:mm:ss" }, correlationId: vars.correlationId default "", errorCode: "MULE-ERR-500", message: "Internal Server Error", details: error.description default "" }

logger.doc:name: After HTTP: Error Payload and Correlation ID
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: vars.correlationId default "", payload: payload default "" }]
